scripts.sync:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ota:upload: npm run build && npx @capgo/cli@latest bundle upload com.graham.ai --path dist --channel production --bundle 1.0.0-ota.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S).$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) --comment $(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
scripts.ota:upload:beta: npm run build && npx @capgo/cli@latest bundle upload com.graham.ai --path dist --channel beta --bundle 1.0.0-beta.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S).$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) --comment $(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
